# fly_redis (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io Redis database. Import using the database name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_redis" "example" {
  name            = "my-redis"
  org             = "personal"
  region          = "iad"
  plan            = "launch-1"
  enable_eviction = true
  replica_regions = ["ord"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Redis database. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `org` (String) The organization slug. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `region` (String) The primary region. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `enable_eviction` (Boolean) Enable eviction policy.
- `plan` (String) The plan (e.g., free, starter, standard).
- `replica_regions` (List of String) List of replica regions.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Redis database.
- `primary_url` (String, Sensitive) The primary connection URL.
- `status` (String) The Redis database status.
